name: Zap Mustung
effectText: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by card effect during your Main Phase 1, and cannot be Special Summoned if you have Special Summoned this turn. The first two times this card would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. Each turn, the turn player can only Special Summon a number of times up to their number of attacks conducted (and reached the Damage Step) this turn.
